docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLEY, PAMELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIRCHER, MEGAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY KELLEY, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT KIRCHER, MEGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00- SERVED FEB-26-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIRCHER, MEGAN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.
